figures.caption: Figure 1: Unified view of diffusion, score-based, and flow-matching generative models as probability transport between a data distribution ρ0 and a reference distribution ρ1.
Table 1: Unified notation used throughout the survey.

Table 2: Master comparison of diffusion, score-based, probability-flow, and flow-matching methods under the unified transport viewpoint. The most important distinctions are: (i) what field is learned, (ii) how the probability path is specified, and (iii) whether sampling is performed with stochastic or deterministic dynamics.
